ground_truth.title: Software Development Models: Types and Their Comparison
ground_truth.author: Anastasia Moroz
with: Software development methodologies are an important part of making the process of application building more effective.
The main goal of the software development life cycle, or SDLC methodologies, is to make the development process more systematic and efficient.
According to GoodFirms, the most popular development methodologies are Agile (61.5%), Scrum (21.3%), and Waterfall (9.6%).
Different software development models help developers build software and applications in a more conscious way.
Choosing a project management strategy that fits best depends on your team structure and experience, the project goals and requirements, budget, and many other factors.
